title: The Night Watcher
description: The Watcher Stalks at night. Stay safe
body:
When night falls the watcher comes out to play.

You are safe during the day, set up shelter and survive the night. The watcher is smart and will learn where you live. It may leave diamonds outside of your door to bait you out, he will drain your sanity and strike at your lowest point. 

You are not alone in this world, Benjamin is your companion and you need him. If Benjamin dies your sanity drains and you suffer. You can gear Benjamin up by giving him armor and a sword. Without a sword he cannot defend himself. You can give Benjamin orders, all commands are listed below.

Benjamin Commands: 
- Come here, Makes Benjamin run to you.
- Can you get some wood?, Will make Benjamin go gather wood.
- Stay here, Makes Benjamin stay in the spot you told him too.
- Follow me, Makes Benjamin follow you.
- Wake up, Wakes Benjamin up from his slumber.
